ApiConfiguration.getOpenManAdds: SELECT * FROM x_ManAdds_Registration where RegistrationStatus = 'Running' and EndDateTime is null
ApiConfiguration.getOpenManAdd: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM x_ManAdds_Registration where Id = @id
ApiConfiguration.UpdateOpenManAdd: UPDATE x_ManAdds_Registration SET ActualAmount = @actualAmount, EndDateTime = GETDATE(), RegisteredBy = @registeredBy, RegistrationStatus = 'Complete' WHERE Id = @id
ApiConfiguration.AutoBatch.getStatus: SELECT ValueToUse FROM a_ProjectSetup WHERE ReferenceName = 'x_AutoRunBatches_Enabled'
ApiConfiguration.AutoBatch.updateStatus: UPDATE a_ProjectSetup SET ValueToUse = @value WHERE ReferenceName = 'x_AutoRunBatches_Enabled'
ApiConfiguration.ManAddUsers.getAll: SELECT u.ID, u.Name FROM Users u INNER JOIN User_UserGroup uug ON u.ID = uug.Users_ID INNER JOIN UserGroup ug ON ug.ID = uug.UserGroup_ID WHERE ug.Name = 'Registro ManAdds'
